title: Implement deterministic map grid and chunk dirty queues
summary: Implement the M1 authoritative map grid, chunk metadata, terrain/walk/occupancy fields, local dirty queues, rebuild budgets and canonical hash/snapshot hooks.
acceptance: Map data uses contiguous numeric storage rather than per-cell object graphs
Terrain, occupancy, walk cost, region id, room id and per-cell/chunk version fields are authoritative in sim-core
Dirty queues are local, budgeted per tick and cannot grow in unchanged worlds
World hash and save snapshot include map state in stable order
